title: Tae Diath
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Taediath.jpg]] |name=Tae Diath |homeworld= |birth=[[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]][[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]] |death=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]][[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Brown |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Diath family]] *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[Nico Diath]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|When Nico was alive, he made me listen to his thoughts whenever I lost control like this. It was like listening to an ocean breathe.|Tae Diath|}} '''Tae Diath''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was the apprentice of his uncle, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nico Diath]]. ==Biography== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] born into a [[Diath family|family]] which had produced a long line of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], Tae Diath was quickly turned over to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to begin the [[Jedi training/Legends|training]]. Selected by his uncle, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nico Diath]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], young Diath had a strong bond with his master, focusing on his mind whenever he felt his control of his [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic abilities]] was slipping. Under his master's instruction, Diath crafted for himself a [[Color/Legends|green]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Diath's took up ranks in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Padawan Diath, now a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]], led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] alongside his master; however, on a mission without his Padawan, Master Diath was [[Death/Legends|slain]] on [[Queyta]]. Following his master's death, a grieving Diath was dispatched to the [[Battle of Jabiim|battlefields]] of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] where he became one of the orphaned Padawans comprising the [[Padawan Pack]]. [[File:TaeDiathDeath.jpg|thumb|left|190px|Tae Diath is shot and killed by [[A-series assassin droid]]s.]] As the group worked together to survive through the battle's harsh conditions, Padawan Diath was often distracted by his mentor's death, often making comments about his Master's great ability and power. Combined with the stresses of war, Diath's grief caused his telepathic abilities to act up, causing Diath much discomfort and lack of clarity. To aid her comrade, fellow Padawan [[Elora Sund]] forged a mental link with Diath which allowed him to remain calm and in control. As the battle surged forward, the Padawans attempted to stand as the final defense of the Republic's sole remaining base. Defending it from the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] and their leader, [[Alto Stratus]], Diath was killed by several vicious [[A-series assassin droid]]s. Upon his death, Padawan Sund was simultaneously killed as a result of psychic backlash. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Stay out of his head, Tae.''"
"''I can't help it, Elora. Anakin broadcasts his emotions like a jamming beacon. I can't even think straight around him.|Elora Sund and Tae Diath|}} Tae Diath exhibited talent with [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tae Diath}} *[[Republic 53|''Republic'' 53]] {{1st}} {{Hologram}} *[[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]] {{1stID|Tae Diath}} *[[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] *[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tae Diath |es=Tae Diath |pl=Tae Diath |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Diath, Tae}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]]
